calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Jun-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Angel R. Pablo's motion for post judgment attorneys fees is granted in the amount of $1,050. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Dec-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Angel Ramirez Pable's motion for assignment of rights, restraining and turnover order is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Sep-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Assignee Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
